attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,3 
,BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,PRODUCT_KEY           
,WOSGLF.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY             
,DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   
,(BOK.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO )  DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,BOK.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         /* Added part of True Demand */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SRVC_BKGS_TSS BOK 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_QTR_OTQ_SRVC_GDS_LINK WOSGLF ON( WOSGLF.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY=BOK.PRODUCT_KEY
AND BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WOSGLF.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_QTR_TSS_BKGS_ALLOCATED ALLOC 
ON ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND ALLOC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
WHERE ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY IS NULL 
/* NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  MAPPED_SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SMT_SPD_GPD_LINK 
GROUP   BY 1 ) LINK WHERE LINK.MAPPED_SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY = BOK.PRODUCT_KEY )   
AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_QUOTE_UNQUE_ORD2 TEMP WHERE TEMP.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ) */
AND BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN ( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL WHERE BATCH_ID = 1 )

SELECT 
BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY

,3 
,BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,PRODUCT_KEY           
,WOSGLF.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY             
,DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   
,(BOK.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,(BOK.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO ) DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,(BOK.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*WOSGLF.SPLIT_RATIO )  DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,BOK.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         /* Added part of True Demand */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SRVC_BKGS_TSS BOK 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_QTR_OTQ_SRVC_GDS_LINK WOSGLF ON( WOSGLF.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY=BOK.PRODUCT_KEY
AND BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WOSGLF.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_QTR_TSS_BKGS_ALLOCATED ALLOC 
ON ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND ALLOC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
WHERE ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY IS NULL 
/* NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  MAPPED_SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SMT_SPD_GPD_LINK 
GROUP   BY 1 ) LINK WHERE LINK.MAPPED_SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY = BOK.PRODUCT_KEY )   
AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_QUOTE_UNQUE_ORD2 TEMP WHERE TEMP.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ) */
AND BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN ( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_QTR_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL WHERE BATCH_ID = 3 )
